entries.title: fix dashboard managed user count
entries.author: huajune
summary: fix dashboard managed user count
fix resume attachment booking flow
fix booking tool formatting
Add a DB-side `count_active_users_from_user_activity_by_range` RPC using `COUNT(DISTINCT chat_id)`.
Add `countActiveUsersByDateRange` through the user hosting repository/service, with a paginated table-scan fallback if the new RPC is not available yet.
Switch Dashboard business totals for non-today ranges to use the distinct count instead of list length.
Add tests covering the count RPC path, fallback path, and capped-list regression.
ops: Add a DB-side `count_active_users_from_user_activity_by_range` RPC using `COUNT(DISTINCT chat_id)`.
Add `countActiveUsersByDateRange` through the user hosting repository/service, with a paginated table-scan fallback if the new RPC is not available yet.
Switch Dashboard business totals for non-today ranges to use the distinct count instead of list length.
Add tests covering the count RPC path, fallback path, and capped-list regression.

entries.title: 兼容苏州兼职群错序标签
entries.author: huajune
businessUpdates: 修复看板人工介入统计
summary: 兼容苏州兼职群错序标签
推荐班次必须列全所有档位
修复看板人工介入统计
Added a targeted compatibility override for `独立客&苏州餐饮兼职群` when its labels are returned as `["兼职群", "餐饮", "苏州"]`.
Kept the original label parsing contract for all other groups.
Added a regression test covering the known Suzhou group `wxid` and label order.
fixes: 修复看板人工介入统计
ops: Added a targeted compatibility override for `独立客&苏州餐饮兼职群` when its labels are returned as `["兼职群", "餐饮", "苏州"]`.
Kept the original label parsing contract for all other groups.
Added a regression test covering the known Suzhou group `wxid` and label order.
兼容苏州兼职群错序标签
推荐班次必须列全所有档位
